tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - single test, core output structure
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a single Robot Framework test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid, well-formed JSON output with at least one named test entry.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Robot Framework - PO - single test, core output structure
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'robot_single_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains 1 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty 'test_name'

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - Template data-driven expands one test per row
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a data-driven Robot Framework template fixture and verifies that each data row is expanded into a separate test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Robot Framework - PO - Template data-driven expands one test per row
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'robot_datadriven_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty 'test_name'

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - PO - FOR loop expands one test per value
tests.journey: A Product Owner uploads a Robot Framework fixture containing a FOR loop and verifies that each loop iteration is expanded into its own test entry in the JSON output.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Robot Framework - PO - FOR loop expands one test per value
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'Product Owner', uploads 'robot_forof_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains 3 or more tests, and every test has a non-empty 'test_name'

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a single Robot Framework test fixture and verifies that the analysis produces valid JSON output including a populated test coverage matrix on the first test.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Robot Framework - QAM - single test, coverage matrix populated
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'robot_single_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains 1 or more tests, every test has a non-empty 'test_name', and the first test has a non-empty 'test_coverage_matrix' array

tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a data-driven Robot Framework template fixture and verifies that all data rows are collapsed into exactly one test with a correctly structured coverage matrix whose row count matches the number of examples.

test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'robot_datadriven_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains exactly 1 test, every test has a non-empty 'test_name', coverage matrix row count matches the examples, and rows conform to the correct Robot Framework schema

tests.test_name: Robot Framework - QAM - FOR loop collapses
tests.journey: A QA Manager uploads a Robot Framework fixture containing a FOR loop and verifies that loop iterations are collapsed into exactly two tests with correctly structured coverage matrices whose row counts match the loop values.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Robot Framework - QAM - FOR loop collapses
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: Selects format 'robot' and role 'QA Manager', uploads 'robot_forof_sample.robot', and clicks 'Document test cases'
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Output panel shows documentation; downloaded JSON has no unresolved values, framework is 'robot', contains exactly 2 tests, every test has a non-empty 'test_name', coverage matrix row count matches the loop values, and rows conform to the correct Robot Framework schema
